channel.title: code on evocations
channel.description: Recent content in code on evocations

item.title: How to model light with computers
item.description: Over the last few weeks, I’ve been poking around with a basic ray-tracer. It’s been fun to tweak values, but it’s my intention to fully understand everything that’s going on under the hood. Studies show that teaching (or preparing for teaching) a subject leads to deeper understanding. Therefore, I’m going to try to explain the concepts at as simple a level as is possible here, for the sake of really grokking this stuff myself.
